description: Declarative manifest of GitHub milestones for AI-actor-game (ex06). Titles and descriptions must match the live GitHub state exactly. due_on is always null per the rule against fabricated due dates. Verify with: uv run python scripts/sync_milestones.py verify

milestones.title: Phase 3 — Full-stack QA
milestones.description: Complete the run_match.py --mode actor smoke test with a chosen LLM backend (docs/LLM_BACKENDS.md); record CLI logs proving MCP communication. See docs/TODO.md Phase 3.

milestones.title: Cloud deployment
milestones.description: Deploy both MCP servers to a public cloud with two public URLs and token-based auth supporting revoke (assignment §6). Evidence: URLs in the internal game report JSON.

milestones.title: Reporting — Gmail JSON
milestones.description: Automated single email to the course address after 6 sub-games, body is JSON only per the internal game report schema (assignment §9); OAuth Desktop client per the Google API guide; credentials never tracked.

milestones.title: Scientific README
milestones.description: Dec-POMDP formal model, orchestration-challenge analysis, learning curves, CLI logs, and GUI screenshots (assignment §11).

milestones.title: Submission
milestones.description: SUBMISSION_CHECKLIST.md fully green, CI green on the submission commit, AI-usage disclosure present.

milestones.title: Bonus — Cross-team series
milestones.description: Optional +10: cross-team cloud series with role swap after 3 sub-games; both teams email identical reports with mutual_agreement true (assignment §12).
